mapper.select: SELECT MENU_CODE AS menuCode, BUILDER_ID AS builderId, VERSION_ID AS versionId, PAGE_ID AS pageId, MENU_TITLE AS menuTitle, MENU_URL AS menuUrl, TEMPLATE_TYPE AS templateType, AUTHORITY_PROFILE_JSON AS authorityProfileJson, VERSION_STATUS AS versionStatus, NODES_JSON AS nodesJson, EVENTS_JSON AS eventsJson, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM SB_SCREEN_BUILDER_DRAFT WHERE MENU_CODE = #{menuCode}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SB_SCREEN_BUILDER_DRAFT WHERE MENU_CODE = #{menuCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SB_SCREEN_BUILDER_DRAFT ( MENU_CODE, BUILDER_ID, VERSION_ID, PAGE_ID, MENU_TITLE, MENU_URL, TEMPLATE_TYPE, AUTHORITY_PROFILE_JSON, VERSION_STATUS, NODES_JSON, EVENTS_JSON, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{menuCode}, #{builderId}, #{versionId}, #{pageId}, #{menuTitle}, #{menuUrl}, #{templateType}, #{authorityProfileJson}, #{versionStatus}, #{nodesJson}, #{eventsJson}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE SB_SCREEN_BUILDER_DRAFT SET BUILDER_ID = #{builderId}, VERSION_ID = #{versionId}, PAGE_ID = #{pageId}, MENU_TITLE = #{menuTitle}, MENU_URL = #{menuUrl}, TEMPLATE_TYPE = #{templateType}, AUTHORITY_PROFILE_JSON = #{authorityProfileJson}, VERSION_STATUS = #{versionStatus}, NODES_JSON = #{nodesJson}, EVENTS_JSON = #{eventsJson}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE MENU_CODE = #{menuCode}
mapper.select: SELECT MENU_CODE AS menuCode, BUILDER_ID AS builderId, VERSION_ID AS versionId, PAGE_ID AS pageId, MENU_TITLE AS menuTitle, MENU_URL AS menuUrl, TEMPLATE_TYPE AS templateType, AUTHORITY_PROFILE_JSON AS authorityProfileJson, VERSION_STATUS AS versionStatus, NODES_JSON AS nodesJson, EVENTS_JSON AS eventsJson, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM SB_SCREEN_BUILDER_DRAFT ORDER BY UPDATED_AT DESC

SELECT MENU_CODE AS menuCode, BUILDER_ID AS builderId, VERSION_ID AS versionId, PAGE_ID AS pageId, MENU_TITLE AS menuTitle, MENU_URL AS menuUrl, TEMPLATE_TYPE AS templateType, VERSION_STATUS AS versionStatus, NODES_JSON AS nodesJson, EVENTS_JSON AS eventsJson, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM SB_SCREEN_BUILDER_HISTORY WHERE MENU_CODE = #{menuCode} AND VERSION_ID = #{versionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SB_SCREEN_BUILDER_HISTORY WHERE MENU_CODE = #{menuCode} AND VERSION_ID = #{versionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SB_SCREEN_BUILDER_HISTORY ( MENU_CODE, BUILDER_ID, VERSION_ID, PAGE_ID, MENU_TITLE, MENU_URL, TEMPLATE_TYPE, VERSION_STATUS, NODES_JSON, EVENTS_JSON, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{menuCode}, #{builderId}, #{versionId}, #{pageId}, #{menuTitle}, #{menuUrl}, #{templateType}, #{versionStatus}, #{nodesJson}, #{eventsJson}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT MENU_CODE AS menuCode, BUILDER_ID AS builderId, VERSION_ID AS versionId, PAGE_ID AS pageId, MENU_TITLE AS menuTitle, MENU_URL AS menuUrl, TEMPLATE_TYPE AS templateType, VERSION_STATUS AS versionStatus, NODES_JSON AS nodesJson, EVENTS_JSON AS eventsJson, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM SB_SCREEN_BUILDER_HISTORY WHERE MENU_CODE = #{menuCode} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT DISTINCT MENU_CODE FROM SB_SCREEN_BUILDER_HISTORY ORDER BY MENU_CODE
SELECT MENU_CODE AS menuCode, LANG_CODE AS langCode, SUMMARY_JSON AS summaryJson, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM SB_STATUS_SUMMARY WHERE MENU_CODE = #{menuCode} AND LANG_CODE = #{langCode}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SB_STATUS_SUMMARY WHERE MENU_CODE = #{menuCode} AND LANG_CODE = #{langCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SB_STATUS_SUMMARY ( MENU_CODE, LANG_CODE, SUMMARY_JSON, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{menuCode}, #{langCode}, #{summaryJson}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE SB_STATUS_SUMMARY SET SUMMARY_JSON = #{summaryJson}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE MENU_CODE = #{menuCode} AND LANG_CODE = #{langCode}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SB_STATUS_SUMMARY WHERE MENU_CODE = #{menuCode} AND LANG_CODE = #{langCode}
